title: Personal Assistant
description:
SUMMARY

A highly organized and proactive Assistant to the Senior Executive Assistant providing critical administrative and operational support to ensure the smooth functioning of executive-level activities. This role involves managing complex calendars, coordinating travel and meetings, preparing high-level correspondence and reports, and acting as a liaison between senior management and internal/external stakeholders. With strong attention to detail, discretion, and a solutions-driven mindset, the assistant ensures the Senior Executive Assistant is well-supported in delivering timely and efficient service to the senior management team.

ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Administrative support to Senior EA in managing office tasks
  • Manage and organize calendars, appointments, meetings
  • Managing travel arrangements – flight, Hotel booking, itinerary planning, visa, transportation, travel expenses reimbursements, etc.
  • Maintaining confidentiality of sensitive information and handling sensitive tasks with discretion
  • Maintain filing systems, both digital and physical
  • Perform data entry, research tasks, and follow-ups
  • Assist with project coordination and follow-ups as required
  • Monitor deadlines and ensure timely completion of tasks
  • Run errands and manage personal tasks as directed

REQUIREMENTS

  • Minimum Diploma Business Studies, etc or related fields
  • Ability to multi-task and adapt in a fast-paced environment
  • MS Office - Word, Excel, PowerPoint and Outlook
  • Tech-savvy with the ability to learn new software quickly

postedCompany.description:
Pico Art International Pte Ltd

Pico is one of the world's leading experiential marketing service providers. We pride ourselves on our ability to deliver Total Brand Activation for many of the Fortune 500 companies, government bodies and non-government organisations.

With a proven track record of 40 years in experimential marketing, Pico has earned an unparalleled reputation for transforming creative concepts into living, breathing realities. Paramount to our success lies in our insistence and persistence in servicing our clients and partners with Creativity, Knowledge and Reliability.

We provide total solutions on brand activation as well as satisfy individual needs on specialised areas. Our core businesses include design and fabrication of exhibition stands; general contracting and technical services for trade show organisers; event hall and facility management; events, conferences and show management; supply and installation of overlays for venues; permanent exhibits for museums and themed environments; interior fit-out; and brand signage.

Pico employs some 2,500 professional staff in its sales offices and production facilities in more than 37 cities worldwide.
postedCompany.name: PICO ART INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
